---
name: android-verification
description: Use when running or defining Android-specific Gradle, JUnit, Room migration, instrumentation, or Compose verification. Do not use for non-Android verification.
---

# Android Verification

## Inputs

- Test scope: unit, integration, migration, runtime, or all.
- Android project path.
- Optional test filter.

Use commands from `verification-loop`. If Android commands are still `TBD` after Android project creation, defining and registering them is part of setup and blocks Android feature completion.

## Command slots once Gradle exists

- Unit/domain: `.\gradlew.bat testDebugUnitTest` (includes Robolectric Compose render tests on `:app`)
- Room/integration: module-specific Gradle test task
- Instrumentation/Compose: `.\gradlew.bat connectedDebugAndroidTest`
- Build smoke: `.\gradlew.bat assembleDebug`
- Compose visual snapshots: `.\gradlew.bat :app:recordPaparazziDebug` — regenerates PNGs under `android/app/src/test/snapshots/images/` (gitignored). Agent must `view` each generated PNG.

## Screenshot tests (Paparazzi + Robolectric)

Two complementary host-side stacks cover UI verification without an emulator:

- **Paparazzi** (`app.cash.paparazzi` plugin, LayoutLib renderer) — `LiftoriumAppPaparazziTest`-style classes. Generated by `:app:recordPaparazziDebug`. Output: `android/app/src/test/snapshots/images/<package>_<Class>_<test>.png`. HTML report: `android/app/build/reports/paparazzi/debug/index.html`. Run in artifact-only mode — no committed goldens; each agent run regenerates PNGs.
- **Robolectric + Compose UI test** (`RobolectricTestRunner` + `createAndroidComposeRule`) — `LiftoriumAppRenderTest`-style classes. Runs as part of `:app:testDebugUnitTest`. Use for behavior/semantics-tree assertions, not for PNG capture (`captureToImage()` is unreliable under Robolectric and would require Roborazzi — not adopted; see `docs/decisions.md`).

For any Compose surface change, the agent MUST regenerate the Paparazzi PNGs, call `view` on each, validate visuals against the plan, and list PNG paths in evidence. See `.github/skills/android-implementation/SKILL.md` for the full visual-review loop.

Fidelity limits:
- LayoutLib (Paparazzi) and host-side Skia (Robolectric) approximate device rendering. They cover layout, text, theme tokens, and Material 3 surfaces; they do NOT cover GPU effects, animations mid-flight, system bars, OEM-specific fonts, or real lifecycle behavior.
- Real-device `connectedDebugAndroidTest` remains required for runtime-critical UI (rest timer foreground service, locked-phone notification, process death recovery, OEM behavior).

## Required checks

- Kotlin/domain unit tests.
- Room migration tests.
- Android integration tests for repositories and resource loading.
- Runtime/E2E tests for offline logging, process-death recovery, device interruption, timer-disabled behavior, notification denial, locked-phone timer alert behavior, substitution history visibility, repeat program, reschedule flow, and acceptance scenarios when available.

## Output

- Commands run.
- Pass/fail result.
- Failing tests with concise diagnostics.
- Evidence path or captured output.
